outcome_definition: full_time_share = 1 - (UNEMP / 100) to proxy for the share of the Hispanic-leaning adult labor force employed full-time
sample_selection: All state-year observations from policy_labor_market_data.csv for 2013-2016 with observed LFPR, UNEMP, and a recorded DRIVERSLICENSES indicator
This keeps states that reported the relevant labor-market outcomes and allowed us to track policy variation during the early DACA period
Because the dataset covers the full panel of U.S. states, the analytic sample includes states that did and did not extend undocumented driver licenses
treatment_definition: daca_policy_cohort = (DRIVERSLICENSES == 1) taken as a proxy for state-level expansions that mirror DACA's labor-authorization goals
